summary: Frontend testing of Yrvante website (iteration 26). All 14 features tested and PASSED. Focused on 5 NEW UI changes: 1) Shopping cart icon in nav header linking to /calculator - PASS, 2) Dark Mode €80 add-on in calculator - PASS, 3) Pro card on /pakketten uses grey styling (not dark navy) - PASS, 4) Premium LiveExamples preview has expanded sections (reviews, team, blog) - PASS, 5) Google Reviews section positioned lower on homepage - PASS. Also verified: navigation dropdowns (DIENSTEN/MEER), YRVA10 discount code (10% off), pricing cards (€349/€500/€900/€1400), dark mode toggle across pages, mobile responsive navigation.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Homepage loads without errors - hero section visible
2. PASS: Shopping cart icon visible in navigation header (top right area)
3. PASS: Shopping cart icon links to /calculator
4. PASS: Dark Mode listed as €80 add-on in calculator extras section
5. PASS: Dark Mode €80 can be added to cart, total updates correctly (€900 + €80 = €980)
6. PASS: YRVA10 discount code works (10% off: €980 -> €882)
7. PASS: Pro card on /pakketten uses grey/neutral styling (bg-gray-100, NOT dark navy/blue)
8. PASS: Premium live example preview is extensive (has reviews, team, blog sections)
9. PASS: Google Reviews section positioned lower on homepage (after Services, Process sections)
10. PASS: DIENSTEN dropdown works with correct links (Pakketten/Prijzen/Calculator, Webdesign, Rebranding, Onderhoud & Hosting, Alle Branches)
11. PASS: MEER dropdown works with correct links (Over Mij, Waarom een Website?, Blog, Pakketten & Prijzen, Privacybeleid)
12. PASS: Dark mode toggle works across all pages without visual bugs
13. PASS: All pricing cards show correctly: Rebranding €349, Basis €500, Pro €900, Premium €1400
14. PASS: /pakketten page loads with Before/After slider and Competitor Comparison
15. PASS: Mobile responsive navigation works (hamburger menu with all links)
critical_code_review_comments: Shopping cart icon (ShoppingCart from lucide-react) correctly placed in navigation with data-testid='nav-cart-icon'
Dark Mode add-on properly implemented in CalculatorPage.jsx with €80 price and data-testid='addon-darkMode'
Pro card on /pakketten uses light grey background (rgb(243, 244, 246) = gray-100) - neutral Yrvante style
Premium LiveExamples preview includes expanded sections: Google Reviews, Team section, Blog posts, CTA banner, Multi-language indicator
Section order on homepage: Hero > TrustBadges > WhyExpensive > Pakketten > LiveExamples > PackageQuiz > Services > Process > GoogleReviews > Expertise > Hosting > FAQ > Contact
Dark mode persists across page navigation using ThemeContext
Mobile menu includes 'Meer' section with all hidden page links
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26: All 5 NEW UI changes tested and working. 1) Shopping cart icon in nav header links to /calculator (data-testid='nav-cart-icon'), 2) Dark Mode €80 add-on in calculator works (data-testid='addon-darkMode'), 3) Pro card on /pakketten uses grey styling (bg-gray-100), 4) Premium LiveExamples has expanded preview with reviews/team/blog sections, 5) Google Reviews positioned after Services/Process sections on homepage. Navigation dropdowns (DIENSTEN/MEER) work. YRVA10 discount code gives 10% off. Dark mode toggle persists across pages. Mobile responsive navigation works with hamburger menu.
